articles.title: Court backs Kerala’s revised engineering admission policy: Why it rejected CBSE students’ challenge
articles.excerpt: The government's decision to adopt a Tamil Nadu-style mark normalisation model was a valid exercise aimed at ensuring parity among students from different educational boards, the Kerala High Court ruled.
articles.content: The government's decision to adopt a Tamil Nadu-style mark normalisation model was a valid exercise aimed at ensuring parity among students from different educational boards, the Kerala High Court ruled.
